outliers.title: Why Most People Carry Their Gun WRONG (This Mistake Could Get You Killed)
outliers.whyItWorked: Life-or-death stakes + mistake framing = cannot scroll past. Viewer fears they are making this exact error.
outliers.thumbnailStyle: Red warning overlay, instructor pointing directly at camera, bold white text

outliers.title: I Tested 7 Holsters Under $50 — Here's What Actually Holds Up
outliers.whyItWorked: Budget framing + large test sample + everyday use focus hits the pragmatic CCW buyer at peak research moment
outliers.thumbnailStyle: Holsters lined up on dark surface, strong number 7, split with creator

outliers.title: The 5 CCW Laws Every Carrier Must Know in 2026
outliers.whyItWorked: Year-specific legal content + 'must know' urgency + real consequence framing drives high watch time
outliers.thumbnailStyle: Legal text bg, number 5 in gold, attorney or serious creator face

titleFormula.formula: Life Consequence Frame + Mistake/Test Verb + Specific Gear or Law + Year or Stakes Anchor

thumbnailPattern.value: Dark bg, instructor pointing at camera or product lineup, high-contrast text, red or gold accent — authority framing outperforms lifestyle shots by 3.1×

nextVideo.title: Why Most People Carry Their Firearm in the Wrong Position (And How to Fix It Today)
nextVideo.angle: Mistake-framing with immediate fix creates high urgency to watch — viewers fear they are unknowingly doing this wrong right now

thumbnailConcept.leftSide: Demonstration of wrong carry position (red X overlay)

nextVideo.scriptHook: The most dangerous thing about carrying incorrectly isn't the discomfort. It's that you won't know it's wrong until the one moment it matters most. Today I'm going to show you the three carry position mistakes I see at every range — mistakes that could cost you a critical second or get your firearm taken in a struggle. I've been teaching this for eleven years. Let's fix it right now.
hooks: Most carriers don't know they're doing this wrong until it's too late. Here's what to check today.
I've trained over 2,000 carriers. This is the mistake I see 80% of them making — and it's easy to fix.
Your carry position could be working against you in the one moment it actually matters.
reasons: Mistake-framing + life stakes = 40% higher CTR than informational titles in CCW niche this month
Constitutional carry expansion created a wave of new carriers actively searching for fundamentals content right now
Tuesday 7pm EST captures the after-work research window — confirmed by 4 of this week's top outliers in this niche

shortsIdeas: 30-sec: Show the #1 carry position mistake with quick correct demo — actionable tip that drives to full video

60-sec: One overlooked CCW law that surprises most carriers — legal tip with serious consequence framing

Is appendix carry actually safer than hip carry?
What do I need to know about carrying in multiple states?

seasonalAlert.title: Constitutional Carry Now Active in 28 States — State-Specific Content Surge
seasonalAlert.content: Three states enacted constitutional carry in the last 90 days. Search volume for 'CCW laws [state]' and 'do I need a permit' is spiking in those states. If you're not creating state-specific or legal update content right now, you're leaving serious search traffic on the table. This window is 60-90 days before it saturates.

gapAnalysis.title: No clear winner for 'carry position mistakes' under 200K subs
gapAnalysis.reason: Top results are 3+ years old or from very large channels with different production styles. Mid-size creator with current, authentic content has a clear path to owning this search.
